fields.Name: YourMembership
fields.Description: YourMembership (Community Brands AMS) REST integration. Base URL https://ws.yourmembership.com, ServiceStack 5.0.2 backend. Supports two auth flows: (1) session-cookie via POST /Ams/Authenticate returning a SessionId used as the x-ss-id header (15-minute TTL); (2) OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + Refresh Token via /OAuth/GetToken (RFC 6749 shape) or /OAuth/GetAccessToken (legacy AppId/AppSecret shape). Every /Ams call is parameterised by ClientID. Pagination is PageSize+PageNumber (1-indexed) with ListCount in the response envelope; responses always carry a ResponseStatus shape on success and on error.

fields.Name: JwtIssuer
fields.Description: JWT issuer surface. Exposes (a) the JWKS public-key set at GET /.well-known/jwks used by clients to verify YM-issued JWT signatures, and (b) the JWT generation endpoint at POST /Ams/Auth/GetJwt that mints a token for the calling session. OpenAPI 2.0 spec: response schema for /.well-known/jwks is JwksResponse{keys:JwkKey[]} per RFC 7517; response schema for /Ams/Auth/GetJwt is JwtIssuerResponse{token}. Both endpoints declared deprecated=false. The GET surface is the canonical read; the POST surface is auth-flow plumbing.

fields.Name: kty
fields.Description: Key Type — RSA, EC, oct, etc. RFC 7517 §4.1.

fields.Name: kid
fields.Description: Key ID — opaque per-key identifier; clients select the verification key by matching kid in the JWT header. NOT marked as primary key in the OpenAPI spec.

fields.Name: use
fields.Description: Public-key Use — typically "sig" (signature) for JWT verification. RFC 7517 §4.2.

fields.Name: alg
fields.Description: Algorithm — e.g., RS256, ES256. RFC 7517 §4.4.

fields.Name: n
fields.Description: RSA modulus (base64url-encoded). Only present for RSA keys. RFC 7518 §6.3.1.1.

fields.Name: e
fields.Description: RSA public exponent (base64url-encoded). Only present for RSA keys. RFC 7518 §6.3.1.2.

fields.Name: OAuthToken
fields.Description: OAuth 2.0 token issuance + refresh endpoints for YourMembership. Three concrete operations are exposed under the OAuth tag: (1) POST /OAuth/GetAccessToken — legacy ServiceStack form (AppId + AppSecret + GrantType=Code|RefreshToken; AppSecert is documented as deprecated in the OpenAPI summary); (2) POST /OAuth/GetToken — RFC 6749 shape (grant_type=authorization_code|refresh_token, client_id/client_secret/code/refresh_token/redirect_uri/scope); (3) POST /OAuth/OIDC/GetAccessToken — OIDC variant with the same RFC 6749 parameter set. All three consume application/x-www-form-urlencoded and produce application/json. INFORMATIONAL surface (auth-flow, not a data entity), exposed as an IO at user request so the auth surface is queryable in MJ metadata.

Note: the key “AppSecert” has been deprecated and will be removed in a future update.","deprecated":false,"paramCount":7},{"path":"/OAuth/GetToken","operationId":"GetTokenGetToken_Post","tags":["OAuth"],"consumes":["application/x-www-form-urlencoded"],"produces":["application/json"],"summary":"Returns the access token for either an authorization code or refresh token.","deprecated":false,"paramCount":7},{"path":"/OAuth/OIDC/GetAccessToken","operationId":"OIDCGetAccessTokenOIDCGetAccessToken_Post","tags":["OAuth"],"consumes":["application/x-www-form-urlencoded"],"produces":["application/json"],"summary":"Returns the access token for either an authorization code or refresh token.","deprecated":false,"paramCount":7}]}

fields.Name: AppSecert
fields.Description: This key has been deprecated and will be removed in a future update. Please use the “AppSecret” key.

fields.Name: AppSecret
fields.Description: This key replaces the “AppSecert” key.

fields.Name: Auth
fields.Description: ServiceStack session-auth endpoint at /auth. Supports HTTP methods: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE. All four methods accept the same parameter set and return the shared AuthenticateResponse envelope (UserId, SessionId, UserName, DisplayName, ReferrerUrl, BearerToken, RefreshToken, ResponseStatus, Meta). Tag: 'auth'. Note: per SOURCE_STUDY §3.4, this is the framework-level session-auth surface; production YM clients typically use /Ams/Authenticate (session-cookie) or /OAuth/GetToken (OAuth 2.0) instead. Captured here for surface completeness and operator visibility.

fields.Name: provider
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. Auth provider key (e.g. credentials, basicauth, jwt, apikey, twitter, facebook, google). Selects the ServiceStack IAuthProvider chain.

fields.Name: State
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. OAuth state echo-back parameter (CSRF protection).

fields.Name: oauth_token
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. OAuth 1.0a request token (used by Twitter-style providers).

fields.Name: oauth_verifier
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. OAuth 1.0a verifier returned by the provider after user consent.

fields.Name: UserName
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. Login identifier for credential-based auth providers.

fields.Name: Password
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. Password for credential-based auth providers.

fields.Name: RememberMe
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=boolean. If true, ServiceStack issues a persistent session cookie.

fields.Name: Continue
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. Post-auth redirect URL.

fields.Name: nonce
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth nonce.

fields.Name: uri
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth URI parameter.

fields.Name: response
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth response hash.

fields.Name: qop
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth quality-of-protection.

fields.Name: nc
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth nonce-count.

fields.Name: cnonce
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. HTTP Digest auth client nonce.

fields.Name: UseTokenCookie
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=boolean. If true, return the session as a token cookie (vs body field).

fields.Name: AccessToken
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. OAuth 2.0 access token (for bearer-based auth flows).

fields.Name: AccessTokenSecret
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. OAuth 1.0a access token secret.

fields.Name: Meta
fields.Description: OpenAPI parameter (in=query). type=string. Arbitrary key=value pairs propagated to the IAuthProvider implementation.

fields.Name: UserId
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string The authenticated user's unique identifier (string per OpenAPI). Populated only on successful auth.

fields.Name: SessionId
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string The ServiceStack session identifier. Use as the x-ss-id header on subsequent /Ams/* calls (15-minute TTL per REST API Getting Started PDF).

fields.Name: UserName
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string The authenticated user's username (echoes the request UserName parameter).

fields.Name: DisplayName
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string Human-friendly display name for the authenticated principal.

fields.Name: ReferrerUrl
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string URL the auth flow will redirect to on success (server-side conventions).

fields.Name: BearerToken
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string JWT bearer token for the authenticated session (only present when UseTokenCookie=true or JWT auth provider is configured).

fields.Name: RefreshToken
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. type=string JWT refresh token paired with the BearerToken.

fields.Name: ResponseStatus
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. Nested: #/definitions/ResponseStatus Standard ServiceStack ResponseStatus envelope (ErrorCode, Message, Errors[]). Present on error; absent or empty on success.

fields.Name: Meta
fields.Description: Response field from AuthenticateResponse envelope. Nested: #/definitions/Dictionary<String,String> Optional Dictionary<string,string> for provider-specific extension data.

fields.Name: Pinpoint
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: Pinpoint. Returns the location city, state, country from coordinates.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/Pinpoint.

fields.Name: LocationCoordinates
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: LocationCoordinates. Returns a list of coordinates for a location string.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/LocationCoordinates.

fields.Name: JobAlertsCriteria
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: JobAlertsCriteria. Returns the selection criteria that has been saved under a given alert ID.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/JobAlertsCriteria.

fields.Name: JobAlerts
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: JobAlerts. Returns a list of jobs from the job alert. / Create a new job alert / Update an existing job alert. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/JobAlerts.

fields.Name: JobSearch
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: JobSearch. Returns a list of jobs that matched your search criteria. For advanced search, use PUT to prevent complex types serialization issues with encoded values. / Returns a list of jobs that matched your search criteria.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/JobSearch.

fields.Name: SavedJobs
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: SavedJobs. Returns a list of saved jobs. / Saves a job to the list of saved jobs. / Deletes a job from the list of saved jobs.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/SavedJobs.

fields.Name: Templates
fields.Description: YMCareers (Ymc) sub-resource: Templates. Returns the filter details needed to build the Advanced Search criteria and Job Alert criteria.. Source: OpenAPI /Ymc/{ClientID}/Member/{MemberID}/Templates.

fields.Name: AmsEvent_Alias
fields.Description: Ams Event sub-resource: Alias. Lives under /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/Alias per the YM OpenAPI 2.0 spec. Return an event's alias. / Set an event's alias.. Operations: GET /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/Alias | POST /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/Alias | DELETE /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/Alias.

fields.Name: EventId
fields.Description: EventId property of EventAlias as declared in OpenAPI 2.0 spec.

fields.Name: Alias
fields.Description: Alias property of EventAlias as declared in OpenAPI 2.0 spec.

fields.Name: ClientID
fields.Description: ClientID property of EventAlias as declared in OpenAPI 2.0 spec.

fields.Name: AmsEvent_AttendeeTypeSessions
fields.Description: Ams Event sub-resource: AttendeeTypeSessions. Lives under /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeSessions per the YM OpenAPI 2.0 spec. Return a list of sessions for a given event, not already assigned to the attendee type. / Assign a list of sessions to an attendee type for a given event.. Operations: GET /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeSessions | POST /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeSessions | DELETE /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeSessions/{Id}.

Return a list of available tickets for a given event. / Assign a ticket to an Attendee Type for a given event.. Operations: GET /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeTickets | POST /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeTickets | DELETE /Ams/{ClientID}/Event/{EventId}/AttendeeTypeTickets/{Id}.

fields.Name: ResponseEnvelope
fields.Description: ServiceStack response envelope wrapping every /Ams response. Carries the ListCount / PageSize / PageNumber pagination triple, the IsForceReload + UsingRedis caching hints, and the ResponseStatus error block. This is a *schema* IO — not a directly-callable endpoint — emitted so downstream sync logic can reference the canonical envelope shape. Evidenced by OpenAPI definition `CampaignEmailListsResponse` and by the shared shape across 223 *Response definitions in the spec; narrated in the REST API Getting Started PDF (2021) page 8.

fields.Name: ListCount
fields.Description: Total count of items matching the query (across all pages). Returned by every paginated /Ams response.

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Number of items per page (echo of the request PageSize parameter; 1-indexed pagination).

fields.Name: PageNumber
fields.Description: Current 1-indexed page number (echo of the request PageNumber parameter).

fields.Name: IsForceReload
fields.Description: ServiceStack hint that the cache layer was forced to reload for this response.

fields.Name: UsingRedis
fields.Description: ServiceStack hint indicating the Redis cache was consulted to serve this response.

fields.Name: ResponseStatus
fields.Description: Nested ResponseStatus object carrying ErrorCode, Message, StackTrace, Errors[] (ResponseError items), and Meta. Present on every response (success or error).
